summary: Comprehensive testing of Vyapaar Network CRM new features completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all new features including customer-only registration, admin user creation, Draft lead status, follow-up pending_with field, and company subcategories.
passed_tests: Admin can create selling partner users
Admin can create sales associate users
Draft status exists in lead statuses
Lead without partner gets Draft status
Draft to New status transition when partner assigned

customer_only_registration.details: Registration page shows 'Customer Registration' badge, button says 'Create Customer Account', info message about contacting admin for other roles is present

admin_user_creation.details: Add User dialog shows all 4 role options (Super Admin, Selling Partner, Sales Associate, Customer). Dialog description says 'All user types can be created here.'

draft_lead_status.details: Lead form shows warning: 'Without a selling partner, this lead will be saved as Draft. It will move to New status when a partner is assigned.' Dashboard shows Draft status in pipeline progress.

draft_to_new_transition.details: Backend test confirmed leads transition from Draft to New when selling partner is assigned

followup_pending_with.details: Lead detail page shows follow-ups with 'Pending with: Customer' and 'Pending with: Selling Partner' labels

company_subcategories.details: Companies page has Sub-categories column showing badges like 'Recruitment', 'Training'. Backend API supports subcategory_ids array for selling partners.

seed_data_creation: Test users created: Admin Created SP, Admin Created SA, Admin Created Customer. Test leads created with Draft status.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features are working correctly. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py cover all new functionality. The app has 4 user roles (super_admin, selling_partner, sales_associate, customer). Only customers can self-register; other roles must be created by admin via POST /api/users endpoint.
